points.title: Instead of asking directly, this Service will assume your consent merely from your usage.

case.title: Instead of asking directly, this Service will assume your consent to changes of terms merely from your usage
case.description: The Service infers your acceptance from your continued usage, instead of prompting you to read the new Terms and asking for direct consent. This doesn’t apply to services that have no way to seek consent from users through their contact details or an account.

points.title: Your account can be suspended for several reasons

case.title: Your account can be suspended for several reasons

points.title: You can delete your content from this service

case.title: You can delete your content from this service
case.description: You can ask the service to remove your content at any time, and it's deleted within a reasonable time.

points.title: Your account can be deleted without prior notice and without a reason

case.title: Your account can be deleted or permanently suspended without prior notice and without a reason
case.description: At any time, your account can be terminated without explanation and without warning by the service.

points.title: Information is gathered about you through third parties

case.title: Information is gathered about you through third parties
case.description: This Service may employ, either identifiable or non-identifiable, data collection from third party sources about you.

points.title: Extra data may be collected about you through promotions

case.title: Extra data may be collected about you through promotions
case.description: Additional personal data may be collected through contests, surveys, promotions, petitions or sweepstakes.

points.title: This service is only available to users over 13 years old

case.title: This service is only available to users over a certain age
case.description: The Services are intended for users who are at least a certain age. If you are younger than the age required then you are prohibited from using the Service.

points.title: You authorise the service to charge a credit card supplied on re-occurring basis

case.title: You authorise the service to charge a credit card supplied on re-occurring basis
case.description: You card will be billed on recurring basis unless cancelled. For instance, monthly or annual subscriptions.

points.title: Some personal data may be kept for business interests or legal obligations

case.title: Some personal data may be kept for business interests or legal obligations
case.description: After the end of the data retention period and/or if you request the deletion of your data, they may still keep it for business interests (fraud detection, transactions...) or legal obligations (tax, legal reporting...)

points.title: Your personal data may be sold or otherwise transferred as part of a bankruptcy proceeding or other type of financial transaction

case.title: Your personal data may be sold or otherwise transferred as part of a bankruptcy proceeding or other type of financial transaction
case.description: If the service gets acquired or is involved in a merger, bankruptcy, reorganisation or sale, your personal data may be transferred or sold.

points.title: You agree not to use the service for illegal purposes

case.title: You agree not to use the service for illegal purposes
case.description: The user agrees not to commit any unlawful acts through the use of the website, including the posting of illegal content or messaging.

points.title: Two factor authentication is provided for your account

case.title: Two factor authentication is provided for your account
case.description: The service provides means of further securing your account with two factor authentification, thus greatly improving account security.

points.title: Your IP address is collected, which can be used to view your approximate location

case.title: Your IP address is collected, which can be used to view your approximate location

points.title: Minors must have the authorization of their legal guardians to use the service

case.title: Minors must have the authorization of their legal guardians to use the service
case.description: Minors must have the authorization of their legal guardians to use the services. The legal guardians are responsible for the use of the service by the minor.

points.title: Your provided identifiable information is actively checked by the service

case.title: Your provided identifiable information is actively checked by the service
case.description: The service checks if the required identifiable information you've provided is correct, and may do so on a regular basis. The check measures could be analyzing your browser information and/or providing the identifiable information to a third-party or the authority, thus compromising your anonymity.
